title: How the Cole Disaster Drove the U.S. to Develop New Warship Defenses
summary_full: The Navy destroyers enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after an American warship was attacked and nearly sunk more than 25 years ago.
summary_public: The Navy destroyers enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after an American warship was attacked and nearly sunk more than 25 years ago.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: blockade of Iranian ports carry weapons fielded after
